# Incursa Integrations Public

`integrations-public` is the public provider-implementation repository for the Incursa split. Keep this repo focused on concrete adapters and provider-backed implementations that can depend on `platform`, while keeping provider-neutral abstractions in [C:\src\incursa\platform](C:/src/incursa/platform).

## Repository map

- `src/`: public provider-specific packages and concrete provider implementations
- `tests/`: provider-focused tests, smoke hosts, and the smallest shared test helpers needed by this repo
- `tools/`: schema migration tooling that ships with moved provider packages
- `eng/`: package catalog and versioning helpers
- `docs/`: architecture, scope boundary, and repository split records

## Primary solutions

- `Incursa.Integrations.Public.slnx`: day-to-day solution for the public integrations surface
- `Incursa.Integrations.Public.CI.slnx`: build/test/pack solution for this repo

## Dependency boundary

- `integrations-public` may reference `platform`
- `platform` must not reference `integrations-public`
- external `platform` dependencies are consumed as NuGet packages; CI does not check out a sibling `../platform` repo
- package names stay stable even when they still use the `Incursa.Platform.*` family

## Package families in this repo

Public integrations:

- `src/Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare.CustomDomains/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare.Dns/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare.KvProbe/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.Abstractions/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.Storage.Azure/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.Stripe/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.Abstractions/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.Access/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.Audit/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.Webhooks/`

Provider implementations with stable `Incursa.Platform.*` identities:

- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.Postmark/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.Postgres/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.SqlServer/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.InMemory/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Postgres/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.SqlServer/`

Supporting test/tooling projects retained here:

- `tests/Incursa.Platform.Access.Tests/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.CustomDomains.Tests/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.Dns.Tests/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.Email.Tests/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.InMemory.Tests/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.Postgres.Tests/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.SqlServer.Tests/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.Smoke.AppHost/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.Smoke.ServiceDefaults/`
- `tests/Incursa.Platform.SmokeWeb/`
- `tools/migrations/src/Incursa.Platform.SchemaMigrations.Cli/`

## Authoritative governance files

- `Directory.Packages.props`: authoritative central package version manifest for NuGet dependencies across the repo
- `eng/package-catalog.json`: authoritative project classification and pack/publish allowlist for this repo
- `eng/package-versions.json`: authoritative per-package semantic version manifest for packable projects
- `eng/Generate-PackageCatalog.ps1`: regenerates the catalog from the current repo tree
- `eng/Initialize-PackageVersions.ps1`: rewrites the version manifest from the current catalog
- `eng/Resolve-AffectedProjects.ps1`: calculates changed projects and reverse dependencies
- `eng/Resolve-VersionPlan.ps1`: calculates semantic version bumps for changed packable projects and reverse dependents
- `eng/Apply-VersionPlan.ps1`: applies the resolved version plan to the manifest and `.csproj` files
- `eng/Test-PackageVersionChanges.ps1`: validates that affected packable projects include version bumps
- `eng/Pack-PublicPackages.ps1`: packs only catalog-allowlisted projects
- `docs/repo-split-plan.md`: classification and split plan used for the extraction
- `docs/repository-split-summary.md`: what moved here and what still depends on `platform`

## Orientation commands

```powershell
pwsh -File .codex/skills/dotnet-repo-discovery/scripts/discover-dotnet-repo.ps1
pwsh -File .codex/skills/dotnet-build-diagnostics/scripts/run-build-diagnostics.ps1
pwsh -File eng/Resolve-VersionPlan.ps1 -Base origin/main -Head HEAD -AsJson
```

When tests are involved:

```bash
bash .codex/skills/dotnet-test-triage/scripts/run-test-triage.sh
```

## Validation commands

```powershell
dotnet restore Incursa.Integrations.Public.CI.slnx
dotnet tool restore
dotnet build Incursa.Integrations.Public.CI.slnx -c Release
dotnet test Incursa.Integrations.Public.CI.slnx -c Release
pwsh -File eng/Generate-PackageCatalog.ps1
pwsh -File eng/Initialize-PackageVersions.ps1
pwsh -File eng/Pack-PublicPackages.ps1 -Configuration Release -OutputPath ./nupkgs
```
